The '''Museum of the Old Republic''' was a [[Museum/Legends|museum]] established by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Republic Senate]] on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]]. It contained an [[The Aviary (Centares)|aviary]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], it was shut down by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and used by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to interrogate [[Thurlow Harris]], a captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. It was there that he first learned of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] name.

==Appearances==
*[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]] {{1st}}
